title: Unhandled Exceptions in Async Functions
description: Async functions can sometimes propagate unhandled exceptions back to the event loop, leading to crashes. Wrap asynchronous code in try-except blocks to catch and log exceptions.

title: Race Conditions in Background Tasks
description: Race conditions can occur when multiple requests modify shared data. Use asyncio synchronization primitives to coordinate access to shared data.

title: Risk of Null Reference in Security Models
description: Security models might not perform null checks on credentials or tokens. Ensure all parameters are validated and not null before use.

title: Potential Resource Leaks in Applications
description: Resources like database connections could be left open if not properly managed. Utilize context managers for resource management.

title: Refactor Complexity in Routing Logic
description: The routing files are extensive and may contain convoluted logic. Refactor to simplify routing logic and split large functions into smaller units.

title: Add Missing Type Annotations
description: Lack of type hints can lead to type mismatch errors. Add type hints to all function signatures for clarity.
